ground_truth.title: Footwear News
ground_truth.main_content: Footwear News homepage featuring the latest shoe industry news, sneaker trends, fashion news and celebrity style. Featured stories include: As Nike Stock Slides, What's Dragging the Swoosh Down + 2 Bright Spots; This Veteran Shoemaker Crafts Bespoke Footwear in Her Cotswolds Garden; Golden Goose's New Owners Are HSG, Temasek and True Light Capital; There's No Demand Issue at Birkenstock, but It Does Have a Temporary Production Problem; Declining Children's Shoe Prices Help to Cool Rising Footwear Costs in November; Boot Sales Had a Slow Start This Fall, But Business Is Now More Brisk as Winter Takes Hold; Fila Parent Misto Holdings to Relocate Seoul HQ as It 'Accelerates' Company Transformation; Asics Establishes 'Institute of Sport Science' Research Hub at the University of Michigan; Puma Secures New Financing Loan as Sale Speculation Continues; New Balance SVP Melissa Worth Is Departing. Also features sections on Industry News, Features, Sneakers, and Trends.
